projects.title: l8ter
projects.hook: iOS inbox for TikTok reels. Claude multimodal classifies, web_search verifies, CoreLocation nudges you when you walk past a saved spot.
projects.summary: Registry-driven prompt compiles user-defined categories into the Claude tool schema at runtime, so the valid output enum changes dynamically without mutating the cached system prompt. Review queue with confidence-thresholded flagging, multimodal image+caption extraction, graceful tool-failure fallbacks, and prompt caching for cost control.

projects.title: prelegal
projects.hook: AI-guided legal drafting on 12 Common Paper templates. Multi-user SaaS with live markdown preview and themed PDF export.
projects.summary: Template-suggestion flow routes plain-language requests to the closest matching legal template. Per-turn auto-save of chat + draft state, AI-draft disclaimers on every surface, and a custom Amber Terminal Archive visual direction (CRT chrome around cream serif preview) carried through to the PDF export. Delivered in one week on a tracked plan.

projects.title: Kanban PM
projects.hook: Full-stack Kanban with JWT auth, multi-board isolation, and an AI sidebar that reads and mutates the board via structured tool calls.
projects.summary: AI assistant can add cards, move columns, and assign labels via structured tool calls scoped to the active board. 44 Vitest + 71 pytest tests plus Playwright E2E flows (including AI-chat mocked endpoints). Custom Warm Atelier design system: Instrument Serif + DM Sans, warm amber/copper palette, grain texture.
